runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - Frontend and AI Assistant Broad Evaluation

expertAssessments.rationale: Production UI and AI assistant flows were exercised end-to-end across sidebar and fullscreen surfaces.
AI feedback is stored successfully, but Langfuse forwarding is skipped because the production feedback request does not carry a traceId.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Restore traceId propagation from streamed assistant responses into client feedback requests, then verify langfuseStatus=success on production.

expertAssessments.rationale: Streaming production path returned cloud-run headers and the feedback endpoint persisted ratings without auth/runtime failures during QA.
Latest production deployment was READY/PROMOTED and Cloud Run-backed streaming responses were observed from the live Vercel deployment.
Playwright MCP covered landing, dashboard, AI sidebar, fullscreen assistant, and feedback flow in one production session.
Trace linkage is incomplete on the feedback path, so some production AI evaluations cannot currently be tied back to Langfuse traces.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Ensure trace metadata survives from stream payload to feedback request and verify trace-linked scoring downstream.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period usage reviewed after production QA; effectiveCost about $15.28 and billedCost effectively 0 with no meaningful overage spike.
usageChecks.evidence: XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp vercel usage --format json --non-interactive && XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp vercel usage --format json --non-interactive --breakdown daily

pendingImprovements.title: AI feedback traceId propagation to Langfuse
pendingImprovements.note: Production feedback API returned success with stored=database but langfuseStatus=skipped because traceId was absent from the feedback request payload.

notes: Guest entry, dashboard KPIs, AI sidebar, Reporter, Analyst, and fullscreen assistant all worked on production.
Public /monitoring route is not exposed from the frontend app; direct authenticated Cloud Run monitoring verification was out of scope for this run.
